ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used (e.g., SVM, RF) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Industry or domain the model is applied to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed, archived) */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration it took to train the model */,
  "training_start_date" TEXT /* Date the training started */,
  "training_end_date" TEXT /* Date the training ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment is approved for public view */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1 to 5 scale) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Optional text review accompanying the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the algorithm is deprecated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the algorithm information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version string */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date this version was released */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Git commit hash for version control */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* JSON string representing the changes made in this version */,
  "is_released" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the version is officially released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "size_mb" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "num_records" INTEGER /* Number of records in the dataset */,
  "num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_references_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_references_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the model */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
